comment:
$$6(1-\sin^2x)+5\sqrt{2}\sin x+2=0\\ 6-6\sin^2x+5\sqrt{2}\sin x+2=0\\ -6\sin^2x+5\sqrt{2}\sin x+8=0\\ 6\sin^2x-5\sqrt{2}\sin x-8=0$$
Замена: \(\sin x=t\)
$$6t^2-5\sqrt{2}t-8=0$$
Дискриминант равен:
$$(5\sqrt{2})^2-4\cdot 6\cdot (-8)=50+192=242=121\cdot 2=11^2\cdot 2\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t=\frac{5\sqrt{2} +11\sqrt{2}}{12} =\frac{16\sqrt{2}}{12}\\ t=\frac{5\sqrt{2} -11\sqrt{2}}{12} =\frac{-6\sqrt{2}}{12} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t=\frac{4\sqrt{2}}{3}\\ t=-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin x=\frac{4\sqrt{2}}{3} -нет\ корней,\ т.к.\ \frac{4\sqrt{2}}{3} >1,\ \sin \in [ -1;1]\\ \sin x=-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=-\frac{\pi }{4} +2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{3\pi }{4} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
б) С помощью единичной окружности отберем корни, которые \(\in \left[\pi;\frac{5\pi}{2}\right]\):
$$\pi+\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{5\pi}{4}\\ 2\pi-\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{7\pi}{4}$$
Нам подойдут корни: \(\frac{5\pi}{4}\), \(\frac{7\pi}{4}\)

Ответ: а) \(x=-\frac{\pi}{4}+2\pi n,n\in Z\), \(x=-\frac{3\pi }{4} +2\pi n,n\in Z\), б) \(\frac{5\pi}{4}\), \(\frac{7\pi}{4}\).

Val.description:
а) Решите уравнение \(6\cos^2x+5\sqrt{2}\sin x+2=0\).
б) Укажите корни этого уравнения на интервале \(\left[\pi;\frac{5\pi}{2}\right]\).
